subcodes.first_line: O ye two doves of divine knowledge! Glorify God, for ye have built your nest in the rose-garden of the Covenant, beneath the shade of the celestial Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو حمامه ایکه عرفان حمد کنید خدا را که در گلشن میثاق در ظل شجره انیسا لانه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
